SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.service

Class AddressPipelineService

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressPipelineService
@Service public class AddressPipelineService extends Object
Orchestrates the full address pipeline that runs at application startup. Part of the service layer — fetches address records from Salesforce, the Google Sheets Loan Tape, and Buildium, performs multi-pass normalized address matching, and writes matched results back to Google Sheets. Invoked by AddressPipelineRunner via runPipeline() immediately after the Spring context is initialized. The pipeline is skipped entirely when address.pipeline.enabled is false.

  • Constructor Details

    • AddressPipelineService

      public AddressPipelineService(SalesforceClient salesforceClient, GoogleSheetsClient googleSheetsClient, BuildiumClient buildiumClient, AddressNormalizer addressNormalizer, AddressQualityService qualityService, AddressPipelineProperties properties)
      Constructs the pipeline service with all required integration clients and helpers.
      Parameters:
      salesforceClient - client for fetching Opportunity records from Salesforce
      googleSheetsClient - client for reading and updating the Loan Tape sheet
      buildiumClient - client for fetching active-lease address records from Buildium
      addressNormalizer - utility for normalizing and keying address strings
      qualityService - service for classifying the quality of Salesforce address records
      properties - pipeline configuration, including enabled flag and sheet details

  • Method Details

    • runPipeline

      public void runPipeline()
      Executes the full address matching and write-back pipeline. Fetches records from Salesforce, the Google Sheets Loan Tape, and Buildium; builds normalized lookup indexes; runs a multi-pass match (full key first, then address-line-only fallback); and writes matched rows back to Google Sheets unless dry-run mode is active. Summary counts are logged at the end of each phase.
